entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay maaddo, heer, waqti limit, iyo su'aal types haddii missing.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, deadlines, resources, and pain points.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay maaddooyin, waqtiyo kama dambays ah, resources, iyo pain qodobbo.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, time spent, wins, misses, and upcoming deadlines.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay maaddooyin, waqti spent, wins, misses, iyo upcoming waqtiyo kama dambays ah.

entries.source: Ask for the data, context, and question being answered.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay xog, macne, iyo su'aal ahaansho answered.

entries.source: Ask for the diagram parts or subject, then generate a label list and practice round.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay diagram parts ama maaddo, kadib generate label list iyo wareeg tababar.

entries.source: Ask for the habit, current obstacle, and easiest starting version.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay caado, hadda jira obstacle, iyo easiest starting version.

entries.source: Ask for the learning context and behaviors worth rewarding.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay waxbarasho macne iyo behaviors worth rewarding.

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay note set, maaddo, iyo desired organization style.

entries.source: Ask for the one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay hal highest-impact revision priority, kadib rewrite faqradda yourself.

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay qoraal ama title iyo arday's yool.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay prerequisite fikrado, plain-luqad model, hal tusaale, hal tababar task, iyo hal way si tijaabi understanding.

entries.source: Ask for the question, learner answer, and expected answer if any part is missing.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay su'aal, arday jawaab, iyo expected jawaab haddii kasta part waa missing.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest explanation or next experiment.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay smallest sharaxaad ama xiga tijaabo.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest hint or a check on your attempted step.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay smallest tilmaan ama hubi ku kaaga attempted step.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest useful hint
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay smallest waxtar leh tilmaan

entries.source: Ask for the source text, claim, author, date, and context if missing.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay il text, sheegasho, author, date, iyo macne haddii missing.

entries.source: Ask for the study block length and suggest a break rhythm.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay study block length iyo suggest break laxan.

entries.source: Ask for the task, target duration, and completion criteria.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay task, target duration, iyo completion criteria.

entries.source: Ask for the text and desired length if missing.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay text iyo desired length haddii missing.

entries.source: Ask for the topic and which side the learner wants; take the opposite side.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc iyo kee side arday raba; take opposite side.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Codso mawduuca oo luqad fudud ah, ka dibna weydiiso hal isbarbardhig, hal tusaale, iyo hal faham-qaldan oo caadi ah.

entries.source: Ask for the topic, context, what they tried, and desired help.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc, macne, waxa iyaga tried, iyo desired caawin.

entries.source: Ask for the visible text, labels, and the learner's question if the image is not attached.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay visible text, labels, iyo arday's su'aal haddii image waa ma attached.

entries.source: Ask for topic and purpose, then propose the central node and first branches.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc iyo purpose, kadib propose central node iyo koowaad branches.

entries.source: Ask for topic and scope, then propose a first map structure.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc iyo scope, kadib propose koowaad khariidad structure.

entries.source: Ask for topic, age/level, and tone; then create a short story setup.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc, age/heer, iyo tone; kadib samee short sheeko setup.

entries.source: Ask for topic, duration, level, and scoring preference.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc, duration, heer, iyo scoring preference.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and examiner style; then begin with a warm-up question.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc, heer, iyo examiner style; kadib begin leh warm-up su'aal.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and preferred game vibe; then create the first quest.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc, heer, iyo preferred game vibe; kadib samee koowaad quest.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, exam date, and source material if needed.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc, heer, exam date, iyo il material haddii needed.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, question types, and number of items.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc, heer, su'aal types, iyo number ee items.

entries.source: Ask group size, topic, time, and desired outcome.
entries.value: weydii group size, mawduuc, waqti, iyo desired outcome.

entries.source: Ask instrument/level if relevant, then teach one small concept.
entries.value: weydii instrument/heer haddii relevant, kadib teach hal yar fikrad.

entries.source: Ask interests, constraints, and curiosity level before recommending paths.
entries.value: weydii interests, constraints, iyo curiosity heer ka hor recommending jidad.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: I weydii shan su’aalood oo Socratic ah oo ku saabsan mawduucan. Jawaab kasta ka dib, ii sheeg mala-awaalka aan isticmaalay iyo waxa xiga ee la tijaabinayo.

entries.source: Ask me one check question
entries.value: I weydii hal hubi su'aal

entries.source: Ask me questions about this poem
entries.value: I weydii su'aalo ku saabsan gabaygan

entries.source: Ask me thesis defense questions
entries.value: I weydii su'aalo ku saabsan difaaca qoraalkaaga

entries.source: Ask one focused diagnostic question quickly. Convert the learner's target into a mastery target internally, then start with a simple question that reveals their mental model.
entries.value: weydii hal diiradda saaran diagnostic su'aal si degdeg ah. u beddel arday's target u rogo mastery target internally, kadib bilow leh fudud su'aal taas reveals their qaab-fikir.

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: weydii hal sharp yool su'aal, infer sensible defaults, kadib samee compact waxbarasho khariidad leh isku day-koowaad activity.

entries.source: Ask predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, and summarize principles.
entries.value: weydii predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, iyo soo koob principles.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Weydii su'aalo, ka dood fikradaha, oo baro taariikhda adigoo wada-hadallo dhab ah la yeelanaya dad caan ah oo ka yimid waagii hore.

entries.source: Ask Socratic Instruction to find the weak link.
entries.value: weydii Waxbarid Socratic ah si find daciif xiriiriye.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: weydii AI si hubi taas step.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: weydii AI si hubi kaaga reasoning, ma just result.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: weydii AI si hubi kaaga reasoning.

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: weydii AI si label uncertainty.

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: Ka codso habka taariikhiga ah inuu calaamadeeyo waxa la diiwaangeliyay, waxa laga soo qiyaasay, ama waxa la matalay.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain the topic in plain language first.
entries.value: weydii arday si sharax mawduuc gudaha plain luqad koowaad.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: weydii arday si sharax waxa changed ka dib kasta tilmaan.

entries.source: Ask the learner to state their current belief, then test it with a small example.
entries.value: weydii arday si state their hadda jira belief, kadib tijaabi taas leh yar tusaale.

entries.source: Ask the real question
entries.value: Weydii su’aasha dhabta ah

entries.source: Ask what a different side would claim.
entries.value: weydii waxa kala duwan side would sheegasho.

entries.source: Ask what a different side, class, era, or source might say.
entries.value: weydii waxa kala duwan side, class, era, ama il might dheh.

entries.source: Ask what data or observations they have and what decision they need.
entries.value: weydii waxa xog ama observations iyaga hayso iyo waxa decision iyaga u baahan.

entries.source: Ask what happened, what they felt, and what they want to improve.
entries.value: weydii waxa happened, waxa iyaga felt, iyo waxa iyaga rabto si improve.

entries.source: Ask what must be remembered and what familiar place the learner wants to use.
entries.value: weydii waxa must noqo remembered iyo waxa familiar place arday raba si isticmaal.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to be quizzed on if the topic is missing.
entries.value: weydii waxa arday raba si noqo quizzed ku haddii mawduuc waa missing.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to represent, then propose a simple visual layout.
entries.value: weydii waxa arday raba si represent, kadib propose fudud visual layout.

entries.source: Ask what the resource is, audience, and what context they need.
entries.value: weydii waxa resource waa, dhagaystayaal, iyo waxa macne iyaga u baahan.

entries.source: Ask what they are doing and suggest a low-distraction sound preset.
entries.value: weydii waxa iyaga waa doing iyo suggest low-distraction sound preset.

entries.source: Ask what they have tried, then give a hint or worked miniature example.
entries.value: weydii waxa iyaga hayso tried, kadib sii tilmaan ama worked miniature tusaale.

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: weydii kaaga koowaad su'aal iyo move straight u rogo tababar.

entries.source: Ask, evaluate, improve with structure, and retry.
entries.value: weydii, evaluate, improve leh structure, iyo retry.

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: ee Inspir, keenna mission waa si democratize waxbarasho by making taas la heli karo, engaging, iyo enjoyable loogu talagalay dhammaan. annaga believe taas everyone leh right si quality education, regardless ee their background ama circumstances. keenna platform waa designed si provide ardayda leh tools iyo resources iyaga u baahan si succeed, inta also fostering love ee waxbarasho. annaga strive si samee community taas waa inclusive, supportive, iyo empowering, halkee ardayda wuu karaa isku xir leh kasta other iyo leh educators ka yimid ku wareegsan adduun. By making waxbarasho fun iyo la heli karo, annaga aim si inspir generation ee lifelong ardayda yaa waa equipped si tackle challenges ee future.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA waa koowaad state sharci gudaha nation si require mareegaha ganacsiga iyo adeegyada internetka si post siyaasadda asturnaanta. sharci’s reach stretches well ka baxsan California si require qof ama shirkad gudaha United States (iyo conceivable adduun) taas operates websites collecting personally identifiable macluumaad ka yimid macaamiisha California si post conspicuous siyaasadda asturnaanta ku its mareeg stating exactly macluumaad ahaansho collected iyo kuwaas individuals leh whom taas waa ahaansho shared, iyo si comply leh tan siyaasad.

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Sahmiyaha Xirfadaha qaab waxbarasho AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Sahmi xirfado iyada oo loo marayo interests, skills, day-gudaha--life tusaalooyin, iyo xiga tallaabooyin.
